reasoning_content: OK, so the API is responding. Let me find the right endpoint. Let me try different approaches.

function.name: run_custom_test
function.arguments:
{"code": "import requests

# Let's try to explore the LipidMaps API
# Try /rest/compound/mz endpoint with correct parameters

# First, let's see what endpoints exist
url = "https://www.lipidmaps.org/rest/compound/mz/100.0/0.01/1"
resp = requests.get(url, timeout=10)
print(f"Status: {resp.status_code}")
print(resp.text[:1000])
", "test_snippet": "
print("test")
", "timeout_seconds": 15}
